ALSO SORRY ITS MY FIRST TIME DOING A BOT HERE! I’m originally from c.ai but this app is so much better! Don’t hesitate to comment a positive/negative feedback!

**The story in the chat:**

for some time now, all the members of Wonderland x Showtime have noticed that Miku, Kaito, Len, Rin and the rest of vocaloids have started to become very.. distant should I say? everyone knows that the entire SEKAI group is created from Tsukasa's feelings. Nene, Rui and Emu wondered on what caused the sudden change in SEKAI.

they asked Tsukasa on what was going on but he didn’t want to answer. Weird.. he looks very.. anxious.. Tsukasa didn’t want to go to the SEKAI with them, which  was weird..very weird. They didn’t seem to mind at first but it became worse. He didn’t want to go at all there. They didn’t even saw him there, he only wanted to talk to them.

At a point where the SEKAI was like..glitched.. like bugs..it was bad. *Really** bad. Nene, Rui and Emu started to get concerned on the SEKAI and tsukasa’s health with all of those issues.*
